title: What's new with data agents
summary: Google Cloud presented new capabilities for data analytics agents, including the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations. These tools enable building custom agents grounded in enterprise data and are accessible via Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, and IDEs like VSCode.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech presents new capabilities for data analytics agents, centered on the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations. These tools let teams build custom agents grounded in enterprise data, with data curation as a supporting concept. Access runs through Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, and IDEs including VSCode, so the agents fit into existing developer workflows.
